title: Kawaii Dessert Cafe Poster AI
sourceTitle: Kawaii Dessert Cafe Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Photoreal kawaii dessert cafe poster built around strawberry tartlets, chocolate cream pastries, tiramisu cups, toasted marshmallow cubes, and chocolate-dipped popsicle, cozy cafe close-up table scene with hands holding one dessert, white hand-drawn faces, rosy cheeks, tiny arms and legs, hearts, starbursts, crowns, and peace signs directly on desserts, and Berry Queen!, Chocolate Mood, Sweet Squad Goals!, Choco makes everything better!. Subject: strawberry tartlets, chocolate cream pastries, tiramisu cups, toasted marshmallow cubes, and chocolate-dipped popsicle appear as vibrant close-up hero treats with glossy berries, billowy cream, melted chocolate, toasted edges, and appetizing macro texture. Scene: cozy cafe close-up table scene with hands holding one dessert gives the image a cozy cafe context while the frame stays focused on the desserts and warm social-media food mood. Composition: Close-up cinematic food composition with clustered treats, one tactile foreground hero, hands allowed for scale, shallow depth of field, creamy bokeh, and a polished vertical crop. Signature Elements: white hand-drawn faces, rosy cheeks, tiny arms and legs, hearts, starbursts, crowns, and peace signs directly on desserts sits directly on the photoreal desserts as white sketch-style sticker doodles with faces, rosy cheeks, tiny limbs, hearts, starbursts, crowns, peace signs, and floating cute marks. Style: Japanese kawaii aesthetic blended with photorealistic commercial food styling, hyper-real dessert texture, cheerful warm atmosphere, soft luminous glow, and polished Instagram cafe finish. Color Palette: Fixed softly saturated pastel cafe palette with warm amber light, creamy whites, strawberry red, chocolate brown, matcha or berry accents, and clean white doodle lines. Lighting: Warm ambient cafe light with soft luminous highlights on fruit, whipped cream, chocolate, glass, pastry edges, and dessert surfaces. Camera: Macro close-up food photography with shallow depth of field, creamy background bokeh, crisp edible foreground detail, and social-media-ready framing. Typography: Berry Queen!, Chocolate Mood, Sweet Squad Goals!, Choco makes everything better! appear only as whimsical sticker-like speech bubbles around the desserts, not as a poster headline. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.title: Kawaii Dessert Cafe Poster Variant 01

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Photoreal kawaii dessert cafe poster built around matcha roll cake, cream puffs, berry parfait, custard tart, and milk-tea pudding, small Japanese cafe table with linen napkin, fork, and soft window reflections, sketchy white doodle eyes, blush marks, waving arms, sparkle stickers, little crowns, and floating hearts, and Matcha Magic!, Puff Patrol, Tiny Treat Club!, More cream please!. Subject: matcha roll cake, cream puffs, berry parfait, custard tart, and milk-tea pudding appear as vibrant close-up hero treats with glossy berries, billowy cream, melted chocolate, toasted edges, and appetizing macro texture. Scene: small Japanese cafe table with linen napkin, fork, and soft window reflections gives the image a cozy cafe context while the frame stays focused on the desserts and warm social-media food mood. Composition: Close-up cinematic food composition with clustered treats, one tactile foreground hero, hands allowed for scale, shallow depth of field, creamy bokeh, and a polished vertical crop. Style: Japanese kawaii aesthetic blended with photorealistic commercial food styling, hyper-real dessert texture, cheerful warm atmosphere, soft luminous glow, and polished Instagram cafe finish. Color Palette: Fixed softly saturated pastel cafe palette with warm amber light, creamy whites, strawberry red, chocolate brown, matcha or berry accents, and clean white doodle lines. Lighting: Warm ambient cafe light with soft luminous highlights on fruit, whipped cream, chocolate, glass, pastry edges, and dessert surfaces. Camera: Macro close-up food photography with shallow depth of field, creamy background bokeh, crisp edible foreground detail, and social-media-ready framing. Typography: Matcha Magic!, Puff Patrol, Tiny Treat Club!, More cream please! appear only as whimsical sticker-like speech bubbles around the desserts, not as a poster headline. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

Scene: small Japanese cafe table with linen napkin, fork, and soft window reflections gives the image a cozy cafe context while the frame stays focused on the desserts and warm social-media food mood. Composition: Close-up cinematic food composition with clustered treats, one tactile foreground hero, hands allowed for scale, shallow depth of field, creamy bokeh, and a polished vertical crop. Signature Elements: sketchy white doodle eyes, blush marks, waving arms, sparkle stickers, little crowns, and floating hearts sits directly on the photoreal desserts as white sketch-style sticker doodles with faces, rosy cheeks, tiny limbs, hearts, starbursts, crowns, peace signs, and floating cute marks. Style: Japanese kawaii aesthetic blended with photorealistic commercial food styling, hyper-real dessert texture, cheerful warm atmosphere, soft luminous glow, and polished Instagram cafe finish. Color Palette: Fixed softly saturated pastel cafe palette with warm amber light, creamy whites, strawberry red, chocolate brown, matcha or berry accents, and clean white doodle lines. Lighting: Warm ambient cafe light with soft luminous highlights on fruit, whipped cream, chocolate, glass, pastry edges, and dessert surfaces. Camera: Macro close-up food photography with shallow depth of field, creamy background bokeh, crisp edible foreground detail, and social-media-ready framing. Typography: Matcha Magic!, Puff Patrol, Tiny Treat Club!, More cream please! appear only as whimsical sticker-like speech bubbles around the desserts, not as a poster headline. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

imagePrompts.title: Kawaii Dessert Cafe Poster Variant 02
